creator: perky@python.or.kr
text:
>I got a MD5 checksum conflict.  What I fetched has the following value.
>
>MD5 (/usr/ports/distfiles/KoreanCodecs-1.4.tar.gz) = f10fe99044a4737bb78b75c291e44160
>
>Please check it up, thanks.
>

Thank you for caring korean port! :-)
It seems that author modified tarball after release.
I mirrored it again. and new md5 is f10fe.... exactly. yup.
And the modification doesn't have any effect to port except md5.

- Hye-Shik Chang
